Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_PRICES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

WITH CleanedProductCatalogVariant AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

FROM (

SELECT

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS rn

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

WHERE EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE IS NOT NULL

)

WHERE rn = 1

),

RankedVariantPrice AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(vp.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_OFFLINEDATE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_ONLINEDATE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_PRICE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(vp.__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE_KEY,

pcv.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

vp.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_CURRENCYISO AS VARIANT_CURRENCY_CODE,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_OFFLINEDATE AS VARIANT_PRICE_OFFLINE_DATE_BK,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_ONLINEDATE AS VARIANT_PRICE_ONLINE_DATE_BK,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_PRICE AS VARIANT_PRICE_BK,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP AS VARIANT_USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

vp.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_OFFLINEDATE,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_ONLINEDATE,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_PRICE,

vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP,

vp.__LOAD_TS

ORDER BY vp.__LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM

DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_PRICES vp

LEFT JOIN CleanedProductCatalogVariant pcv

ON vp.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND vp.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

)

SELECT *

FROM RankedVariantPrice

WHERE row_priority = 1

;

 

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_OFFLINEDATE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_ONLINEDATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_PRICE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP, __LOAD_TS

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN

Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2 (

);

alter table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRICE2 set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing pricing details for a specific product variant, including currency, user price groups, pricing periods, and any variant-specific price references needed for variant commercialization.';
